creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-08-30 21:24:54 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    misc                 Makefile 
  Added files:
    misc/ruby-progressbar Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Ruby/ProgressBar is a text progress bar library for Ruby.
  It can indicate progress with percentage, a progress bar,
  and estimated remaining time.
  
  WWW:    http://0xcc.net/ruby-progressbar/index.html.en
  
  PR:             ports/126885
  Submitted by:   TAKATSU Tomonari <tota at rtfm.jp>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.889     +1 -0      ports/misc/Makefile
  1.1       +31 -0     ports/misc/ruby-progressbar/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/misc/ruby-progressbar/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/misc/ruby-progressbar/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +5 -0      ports/misc/ruby-progressbar/pkg-plist (new)
